text:
(In reply to Alex S from comment #10)

Sure.

Added here:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=229559

Generated in that way:

% cd ~/.wine/drive_c/Colin\ McRae\ Rally\ 2.0             
% export WINEDEBUG=+wgl                                       
% wine explorer /desktop=name,800x600 CMR2.exe &> wine.log
% xz -9 wine.log

Regards.
